prose.title: 35m mos
prose.body: The 35M Military Occupational Specialty (MOS) is an intelligence analyst in the United States Army. In this role, individuals are responsible for gathering and interpreting information from a variety of sources to assess threats, develop intelligence products, and support military operations. Some of the tasks performed by 35M MOS include conducting research, analyzing data, preparing reports, and collaborating with other intelligence professionals. It is a critical role in providing commanders with the information they need to make informed decisions.
